argument_quality_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no text, so no argument quality to assess.
argument_quality_notes.landscape: Agent did not debate; provided plausible R1 evidence.
argument_quality_notes.botanics: Agent did not debate; provided plausible R1 evidence.

argument_quality_notes.meta: Agent did not debate; provided plausible R1 evidence.

verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents agreed on Taiwan) and terminated the debate. No pairings were necessary.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge followed the evidence hierarchy by prioritizing the 'high' confidence regulatory and meta agents. However, the synthesis was flawed because it accepted the agents' incorrect identification of the location (Taiwan) as fact, rather than critically evaluating the evidence (e.g., the green railing is also common in Hong Kong) against the ground truth. The judge failed to identify that the 'hard constraints' cited were not unique to Taiwan.
